description: Create ai_core/smart_router.cpp - Intelligent query routing engine with confidence-based fallback
steps: Implement route categories: INSTANT, GRAPH, SEARCH, REASON, GENERATE
Implement query analysis to determine optimal route
Implement routing decision tracking for self-optimization
acceptance_criteria: File compiles without errors as part of make all
Has confidence-based fallback (cheap first, escalate if needed)
verification: Run make all and confirm zero compile errors
findings: Created ai_core/smart_router.cpp with 5 routing categories (INSTANT, GRAPH, SEARCH, REASON, GENERATE). Implements keyword-based analysis with accuracy-weighted scoring, confidence-based fallback chains, and per-route success tracking for self-optimization. Compiles cleanly.
